name: axon-lang
summary: AXON v1.5.1 — Lockstep cross-stack release. axon-lang Python + axon-lang Rust crate (renamed from axon-rs, now on crates.io) ship the same version every release, eliminating compatibility-matrix questions. Bumps coordinated via bump-my-version + a GitHub Actions workflow. Functional surface unchanged from v1.5.0: typed channels with pi-calculus mobility, second-order session types, runtime TypedEventBus, migration path from legacy string topics. See paper_mobile_channels.md.
author: Bemarking AI S.A.S.
